zh.lifeSummary: 當Friedrich I Markgraf von Meissen, Landgraf von Thüringen von Meissen I於1257年11月16日出生在德國格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 薩辛-維馬-森亞賀瓦特包格時，他的父親Albrecht II von Thüringen17歲，母親Margaret of Sicily20歲。他於大約1286年與Agnes, Gräfin von Görz und Tirol House of Gorizia在德國薩可-可包格 安德 格塔格塔結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1323年11月16日在他的家鄉享年66歲，埋葬在德國賀林根。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Friedrich I Markgraf von Meissen, Landgraf von Thüringen von Meissen I于1257年11月16日出生在德国格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 薩辛-維馬-森亞賀瓦特包格时，他的父亲Albrecht II von Thüringen17岁，母亲Margaret of Sicily20岁。他于大约1286年与Agnes, Gräfin von Görz und Tirol House of Gorizia在德国薩可-可包格 安德 格塔格塔结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1323年11月16日在他的家乡享年66岁，埋葬在德国賀林根。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of Welsh   Vaughan  .
Chinese: variant of   Wong  .
Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Meissen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English:  see  Missin  .

variants.name: Missin
meanings: English: locative name from Messing (Essex).

nameMeanings.name: Friedrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power’; a royal and imperial name from an early date.

variants.name: Frederick
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic origin, from fred, frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced into Britain by them, but did not survive long. Modern use in Britain dates from the 17th century, and it became more frequent in the 18th among followers of the Elector of Hanover, who in 1714 became George I of England. It was reinforced by the vogue for Germanic names in Victorian times.

variants.name: Friederich
meanings: from frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power’; a royal and imperial name from an early date.

nameMeanings.name: Markgraf
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Gerhard, Wolf.

German and Dutch: status name from Middle High German marcgrāve ‘margrave’ (which is a title derived from marc ‘boundary’ + grāve ‘royal judge’). In some cases the title may have been applied as a nickname for someone with overbearing behavior or as a metonymic occupational name for a servant in the household of a margrave.

variants.name: Margraf
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Mathias.
German and Dutch (of German origin): variant of   Markgraf  .

variants.name: Margrave
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Gerhard, Wolf.

German and Dutch: status name from Middle High German marcgrāve ‘margrave’ (which is a title derived from marc ‘boundary’ + grāve ‘royal judge’). In some cases the title may have been applied as a nickname for someone with overbearing behavior or as a metonymic occupational name for a servant in the household of a margrave.

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Ronald .  It is sometimes used as a given name in its own right.

variants.name: Ronald
meanings: From the Old Norse personal name Rögnvaldr (composed of regin ‘advice, decision’ (also, ‘the gods’) + valdr ‘ruler’). This name was regularly used in the Middle Ages in northern England and Scotland, where Scandinavian influence was strong. It is now widespread throughout the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: Landgraf

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Gerhard, Hans, Otto.
German: status name for a royal judge and administrator of a province (Middle High German lant + grāve), or a nickname for a servant in the household of one.

meanings: From the Old Norse personal name Rögnvaldr (composed of regin ‘advice, decision’ (also, ‘the gods’) + valdr ‘ruler’). This name was regularly used in the Middle Ages in northern England and Scotland, where Scandinavian influence was strong. It is now widespread throughout the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: Thüringen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German (Thüringer): habitational name for someone from Thuringia. The region is named from its former occupation by the T(h)uringii, an ancient Germanic tribe. Compare Deringer and Dieringer .

variants.name: Deringer
meanings: German:
from a short form of an old personal name, a variant of Därr (see Darr ).
variant of Döringer, a habitational name for someone from Thuringia (see Doering ). Compare Derringer .

en.lifeSummary: When Friedrich I Markgraf von Meissen, Landgraf von Thüringen von Meissen I was born on 16 November 1257, in Wartburg, Saxe-Weimar-Eisenach, Germany, his father, Albrecht II von Thüringen, was 17 and his mother, Margaret of Sicily, was 20. He married Agnes, Gräfin von Görz und Tirol House of Gorizia about 1286, in Gotha, Saxe-Coburg and Gotha, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 16 November 1323, in his hometown, at the age of 66, and was buried in Thuringia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Friedrich I Markgraf von Meissen, Landgraf von Thüringen von Meissen I est né le 16 novembre 1257, à Wartburg, Großherzogtum Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Allemagne, son père, Albrecht II von Thüringen, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Margaret of Sicily, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Agnes, Gräfin von Görz und Tirol House of Gorizia environ 1286, à Gotha, Saxe-Coburg and Gotha, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 16 novembre 1323, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Thüringen, Allemagne.

de.Frankfort on the Oder, Frankfurt (Oder),: Frankfurt an der Oder, Brandenburg, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Friedrich I Markgraf von Meissen, Landgraf von Thüringen von Meissen I am 16. November 1257 in Wartburg, Großherzogtum Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Albrecht II von Thüringen 17 und seine Mutter Margaret of Sicily 20. Er hat um 1286 in Gotha, Saxe-Coburg and Gotha, Deutschland Agnes, Gräfin von Görz und Tirol House of Gorizia geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 16. November 1323 im Alter von 66 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Thüringen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Friedrich I Markgraf von Meissen, Landgraf von Thüringen von Meissen I è nato il il 16 novembre 1257 nel Wartburg, Großherzogtum Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Germania, il suo padre, Albrecht II von Thüringen, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Margaret of Sicily, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Agnes, Gräfin von Görz und Tirol House of Gorizia circa 1286, nel Gotha, Saxe-Coburg and Gotha, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 16 novembre 1323, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Thüringen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Friedrich I Markgraf von Meissen, Landgraf von Thüringen von Meissen Iが1257年11月16日にドイツグロssハーゾグトゥム サチセン-ウエイマル-エイセナチワートブルグで生まれた時，父Albrecht II von Thüringenは17歳，母Margaret of Sicilyは20歳であった。約1286年にドイツサクセ-コブルグ アンド ゴサゴサでAgnes, Gräfin von Görz und Tirol House of Goriziaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1323年11月16日に故郷で66歳で死去し，ドイツスuリンジェンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Friedrich I Markgraf von Meissen, Landgraf von Thüringen von Meissen I(이)가 1257년 11월 16일 독일 그로ss헤어즈그투 작센-위마-이센악h 워트버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Albrecht II von Thüringen(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret of Sicily(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1286년 독일 사세-컵르그 앤드 가스아 가스아에서 Agnes, Gräfin von Görz und Tirol House of Gorizia(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1323년 11월 16일 그의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 스u링에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Friedrich I Markgraf von Meissen, Landgraf von Thüringen von Meissen I nasceu em 16 de novembro de 1257, em Wartburg, Großherzogtum Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Alemanha, seu pai, Albrecht II von Thüringen, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Margaret of Sicily, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes, Gräfin von Görz und Tirol House of Gorizia aproximadamente 1286, em Gotha, Saxe-Coburg and Gotha, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 16 de novembro de 1323, em sua cidade natal, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Thüringen, Alemanha.

ru.Frankfort on the Oder, Frankfurt (Oder),: фрэнкфурт ан дир одир, брэнденбург, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Friedrich I Markgraf von Meissen, Landgraf von Thüringen von Meissen I родился 16 ноября 1257 г. в местности вартбург, гроssхирзогтум сачсен-вимар-исенач, Германия, его отцу по имени Albrecht II von Thüringen было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret of Sicily, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes, Gräfin von Görz und Tirol House of Gorizia около 1286 г. в местности гота, саксе-кобург анд гота, Германия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 16 ноября 1323 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности тuринген, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Friedrich I Markgraf von Meissen, Landgraf von Thüringen von Meissen I nació el 16 de noviembre de 1257, en Wartburg, Großherzogtum Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Alemania, su papá, Albrecht II von Thüringen, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Margaret of Sicily, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Agnes, Gräfin von Görz und Tirol House of Gorizia aproximadamente 1286, en Gotha, Saxe-Coburg and Gotha, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 16 de noviembre de 1323, en su pueblo, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Thüringen, Alemania.
